caption: A person is filming a sports card breaking session on a surface featuring the "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" logo. The scene begins with a close-up of several black boxes labeled "OBSIDIAN" stacked on the table, with the person's hand visible near a pile of trading cards. In a picture-in-picture window, a man wearing a black jacket is seen sitting in a room filled with storage bins. As the video progresses, a Google Sheets spreadsheet is overlaid on the screen, listing names and regions. Legible text includes "BRIAN FRANK" associated with "ATLANTIC", "CENTRAL", "PACIFIC", and "SOUTHWEST", as well as "Kennard Bolt" for "NORTHWEST" and "Kyle Barber" for "SOUTHEAST". The top of the spreadsheet is titled "Thu, 7/22/22 - 2020-21 Panini Obsidian Basketball FOTL". The man in the corner window remains present throughout the sequence.
